Meta.homeTitle: Artemis Rental Sifnos | Car, Scooter & Moto Rentals
Meta.homeDescription: Rent cars and scooters in Sifnos with Artemis Rental. Reliable vehicles, fair seasonal rates, and friendly service from Apollonia since 1988.

Nav.whatsappPrefill:
Hello Artemis Rental, I would like to enquire about a rental.

Sent by Rentacarsifnos.com

Home.headline: The freedom to discover Sifnos
Home.subhead: Cars and scooters from Apollonia since 1988, maintained, fairly priced, and ready when the ferry docks.
Home.whyBody: A family-run rental desk in the heart of Apollonia, not a call centre.
Home.why1Body: Every car and scooter is regularly inspected so you can chase beaches and villages with confidence.
Home.why2Body: Compact cars for couples, automatics when you want ease, scooters for quick hops between beaches.
Home.why3Body: Ask about parking in Kastro, the road to Vathi, or a last-minute extension. We answer.
Home.fleetBody: Browse cars and scooters, then send dates. We confirm availability personally.
Home.guideTitle: Plan the island, then pick the keys
Home.guideBody: Our Sifnos Guide answers the questions travellers actually ask, beaches, villages, ferries, and how to get around.
Home.tripPlannerCta: Plan a Cyclades hop with Touristas AI
Home.touristasBody: Ask about our fleet, seasonal rates, ferry pickups, and how to get around Sifnos, then book when you are ready.

Fleet.carsLead: Reliable, well-kept cars for couples, families, and friends exploring Sifnos. Choose dates on each vehicle page. We confirm availability personally, with no prepayment required.
Fleet.scootersLead: Get around beaches and villages quickly with a well-kept scooter from Artemis. Request your dates on each scooter page and we will confirm availability.
Fleet.pricingLead: Real published prices by season. Today’s column is highlighted from the current date.
Fleet.pricingNote: Indicative daily rates. Multi-day offers and exact availability confirmed personally, no prepayment to reserve.
Fleet.termsLicence: Valid licence held for more than {years} year(s)
Fleet.termsPickup: Cars: free pickup at Kamares, heliport, Apollonia, Artemonas & Kastro; Vathi / Platys Gialos / Faros / Chrysopigi on request (fee confirmed at booking). Scooters: Apollonia office only.
Fleet.termsPickupCar: Complimentary pickup & return at Kamares port, heliport, Apollonia, Artemonas, and Kastro. Vathi, Platys Gialos, Faros, and Chrysopigi on request (fee confirmed at booking).
Fleet.termsPickupScooter: Pickup and return at the Apollonia office only.
Fleet.calendarHint: Enquiry only. We confirm availability by phone, WhatsApp, or email.

Rates.title: Car & scooter rental prices in Sifnos
Rates.lead: Published daily rates by season. The current season is highlighted from today’s date.
Rates.scootersNote: Scooter rates apply in mid and peak season (11 Jun – 10 Sep). Outside those dates, ask us for availability.
Rates.note: No prepayment is required to reserve. We confirm by phone, WhatsApp, or email.

Book.title: Book or enquire

Book.name: Full name

Book.altPickup: Cars: free pickup at Kamares port, heliport, Apollonia, Artemonas & Kastro. Vathi, Platys Gialos, Faros & Chrysopigi on request (fee confirmed at booking).
Book.carPickupNote: Cars: free at Kamares port, heliport, Apollonia, Artemonas and Kastro. Vathi, Platys Gialos, Faros and Chrysopigi on request (fee confirmed at booking).
Book.scooterPickupNote: Scooters: pick-up and drop-off at the Apollonia office only.
Book.onRequestFeeNote: Delivery to Vathi, Platys Gialos, Faros or Chrysopigi may include a fee. We confirm it when we reply.
Book.stepVehicleLead: Pick a car or scooter, or let us suggest one that fits your trip.

Book.fillRequired: Add your name, email, and phone to send.
Book.stepReviewLead: Check the summary, then send your enquiry.
Book.estimateDisclaimer: Indicative price only. We confirm the final rate and availability by phone, WhatsApp, or email.
Book.whatsappAckHint: If you use WhatsApp, we also send a short confirmation to your phone from Artemis. No WhatsApp is fine — we still reply by email or phone.

About.title: About Artemis Rental
About.lead: A family rental desk in Apollonia, serving Sifnos travellers since 1988.
About.storyTitle: Island keys, handed over in person
About.story1: Artemis Rental has been renting cars and scooters on Sifnos since {year}, based in Apollonia. We are a family desk, not an anonymous call centre.
About.story2: We offer well-kept vehicles, fair seasonal rates, and practical help with beaches, villages, and ferry arrivals in Kamares.
About.t1988Body: The desk opens in Apollonia. Locals and early visitors start trusting Artemis for island transport.
About.t2000Body: Fleet expands with compact cars suited to Sifnos roads and ferry arrivals.
About.t2020Body: Cars and scooters, seasonal rate clarity, WhatsApp enquiries, and Touristas AI for trip questions.
About.ctaBody: Send your dates. We confirm availability personally, with no prepayment to reserve.

Terms.title: Rental terms
Terms.lead: Key conditions for car and scooter hire with Artemis Rental.
Terms.includedTpl: TPL (third-party liability) insurance on all vehicles & scooters
Terms.includedCarFree: Free car pickup & return: Kamares port, heliport, Apollonia, Artemonas & Kastro
Terms.includedCarRequest: Vathi, Platys Gialos, Faros & Chrysopigi on request (fee confirmed at booking)
Terms.includedScooter: Scooter pickup & return at the Apollonia office only
Terms.ageBody: Vehicle rentals are available to drivers aged {min} to {max}. The driver must hold a valid driving licence for more than {years} year(s).
Terms.pickupBody: Cars: complimentary pickup and return at Kamares port, the heliport, Apollonia, Artemonas, and Kastro. Cars: Vathi, Platys Gialos, Faros, and Chrysopigi are available on request (fee confirmed at booking). Scooters: pickup and return only at the Apollonia office.
Terms.fuelBody: Vehicles are provided with a recorded fuel level and should be returned at a comparable level unless otherwise agreed.
Terms.insuranceBody: TPL (third-party liability) insurance is included on all cars and scooters. Excess, optional cover, and damage procedures are explained at pickup. Ask us for details before you travel.
Terms.paymentBody: No prepayment is required for the booking. We confirm availability by phone, WhatsApp, or email and agree payment terms when your dates are confirmed.
Terms.cancelBody: Please tell us as early as you can if dates change or you need to cancel. We will do our best to accommodate ferry delays and island weather.
Terms.scooterBody: Helmets are provided. Pickup and return are at the Apollonia office only. A valid licence category for the scooter’s engine size is required. Ride defensively on winding island roads.
Terms.privacyBody: If enabled, we may use Cloudflare Web Analytics and/or Google Analytics with IP anonymisation to understand aggregate traffic. We do not sell personal data. Contact us if you have privacy questions about your enquiry.

Chat.title: Touristas AI
Chat.subtitle: Cars, scooters, rates & Sifnos tips
Chat.placeholder: Ask about vehicles, rates, booking, or Sifnos…
Chat.greeting: Hi, I am Touristas for Artemis Rental in Apollonia. Ask me to pick a car or scooter, check rates or pickup, or get a quick Sifnos tip. When you are ready, I can send an enquiry to the desk.
Chat.suggestBook: I want to book a vehicle
Chat.suggestFleet: Which car fits a family of four?
Chat.suggestRates: What does a compact car cost in August?
Chat.suggestPickup: Can I pick up at Kamares port?
Chat.suggestScooter: Suggest a scooter for two of us
Chat.disclaimer: Local Artemis data only. Confirm bookings by phone, WhatsApp or the form.
Chat.unavailable: Something went wrong. Please call +30 22840 33333 or use the booking form.

Footer.description: Family rental desk in Apollonia, fair seasonal rates, personal confirmation, and practical island help.

CookieBanner.title: Your privacy on Artemis Rental
CookieBanner.body: We use essential cookies to run the site. Analytics (Cloudflare / Google) load only if you accept. You can change this anytime.

Privacy.title: Privacy policy
Privacy.lead: How Artemis Rental handles personal data when you browse, enquire, or rent on Sifnos.
Privacy.s1Body: {name} is a family car and scooter rental desk in Apollonia, Sifnos. For privacy questions contact {email}.
Privacy.s2Body: When you send a booking enquiry we may receive your name, email, phone/WhatsApp number, travel dates, preferred vehicle, pickup notes, and message content. If you call or message us, we process the contact details you share. Server and security logs may record technical data such as IP address and browser type.
Privacy.s3Body: We use enquiry data to confirm availability, arrange pickup, and reply to you. We may keep messages for a reasonable period for customer service and accounting. We do not sell your personal data.
Privacy.s4Body: Only after you accept analytics cookies may we load Cloudflare Web Analytics and/or Google Analytics (with IP anonymisation where configured) to understand aggregate traffic. If you choose essential cookies only, these scripts do not load.
Privacy.s5Body: We keep enquiry records as long as needed to handle your request and meet legal obligations, then delete or anonymise them. We share data with service providers only as needed to operate email, hosting, or analytics you consented to.
Privacy.s6Body: Email {email} or call {phone}. You can also read our GDPR rights page for access, correction, and erasure requests.

Cookies.title: Cookie policy
Cookies.lead: What cookies and similar technologies Artemis Rental uses, and how you control them.
Cookies.s1Body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device. We also use local storage for your consent choice so the banner does not reappear every visit.
Cookies.s2Body: Essential cookies and storage keep the site working (language preference, consent record, security). These are always on when you use the site.
Cookies.s3Body: If you click Accept all, we may set analytics cookies via Cloudflare Insights and/or Google Analytics to measure visits in aggregate. They are not used to sell advertising profiles.
Cookies.s4Body: Use Accept all or Essential only on the banner. You can reopen preferences with Manage cookie preferences below, or clear site data in your browser.
Cookies.s5Body: See our Privacy policy for how enquiry data is handled, and the GDPR page for your rights under EU/Greek law.

Gdpr.title: GDPR & your rights
Gdpr.lead: Your rights under the EU General Data Protection Regulation when dealing with Artemis Rental.
Gdpr.s1Body: Depending on applicable law you may have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, or object to processing of your personal data, and to data portability where technically feasible.
Gdpr.s2Body: We process booking enquiries to take steps at your request before a contract and for our legitimate interest in running a rental desk. Analytics run only with your consent.
Gdpr.s3Body: Email {email} with your request. We will respond within the timeframes required by law. We may ask for reasonable information to verify your identity.
Gdpr.s4Body: If you are unhappy with our response you may lodge a complaint with the Hellenic Data Protection Authority (HDPA) or your local EU supervisory authority.
Gdpr.s5Body: Artemis Rental, Apollonia, Sifnos. Email {email}. Phone {phone}.
